title: Kangaroo shaped run stabilizes 200-point plateau
summary: The first fresh Kangaroo run using the optional shaped route-progress objective completed. It made the first 200-point reward much more stable than the previous fresh reward-only run, but it still did not produce any episode above 200, so Kangaroo remains exploratory and not promotable.

policy_v1.py.diagnosis: Reached some upward progress but no reward.

policy_v2.py.diagnosis: Recovered a stable first-reward route and became the best real-reward policy.

policy_v3.py.diagnosis: Improved shaped upward progress but failed real reward, confirming shaped score cannot be treated as task success.

negative_control.interpretation: The higher shaped route-progress score did not translate into real reward.

interpretation: The shaped objective helped stabilize the known first 200-point reward: the follow-up evaluation reached 200 in 31 of 32 episodes.
It did not solve the next route stage: no follow-up episode exceeded 200, and the trace still shows one reward event followed by life loss.
The shaped objective is useful as an experimental scaffold, but it has not yet produced canonical Kangaroo evidence.
The run also demonstrates why real reward must remain the final metric: policy_v3 had a nonzero shaped score and more upward progress but scored 0 under real reward.

rq_mapping.RQ1: Improves Kangaroo first-reward reliability compared with the previous fresh reward-only run, but does not add Kangaroo as a covered game.
rq_mapping.RQ2: Behavioral trace confirms the policy is still a shallow first-reward route rather than a robust ladder-routing solution.
rq_mapping.RQ4: Shows that changing the CMA-ES objective can alter search behavior, but shaped-objective evidence must remain separate from pure reward-only CMA-ES evidence.

recommended_next_steps: Do not run another broad Kangaroo outer loop immediately.
Patch or extend the Kangaroo debug renderer so it can explain policy_v2's new parameter/function layout, then inspect the post-200 decision stack.
If continuing Kangaroo, make the next change narrowly target post-200 behavior after the first RIGHTFIRE reward while preserving the stable 200-point route.
Keep the current shaped run as exploratory evidence and avoid promoting Kangaroo until a policy exceeds 200 under standardized real-reward evaluation and passes behavioral inspection.
